creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like you don't have python-config in path. I'm surprise your
configure script is able to locate the python interpreter, which happens
at a previous phase.

Do you have a non-standard python installation, or a non-standard PATH?

Please attach your config.log.

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
The FreeBSD Project
gahr@FreeBSD.org

PGP Public Key:
http://gahr.ch/pgp
